text:

New Revision: 207947

Log:
  The -d flag is non-optional.

  Submitted by:	Nikolai Saoukh <nms+bsd@otdel-1.org>

Modified:

Modified: head/usr.sbin/uathload/uathload.8

-.Op Fl d Ar ugen-device
